item.name: Tossed Dagger
item.description:
Often seen skimming the waves, shimmering like a blade in flight.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: In contrast to the soaring arcs of its brethren in other parts of the ocean, this fish leaps through the Strait of Merlthor in short, cutting crescents. However, unlike its namesake, two sailors can toss it back and forth for bells and still have all their extremities intact at the end.
